port_metadata.billing_basis: Rates are applied per service and per tugboat utilized.

operational_logic.tariff_selection_criteria: The applicable tariff table is determined by the total accumulated GT of all vessels served in the port during the previous calendar year.
operational_logic.standard_operating_table: Tariff T0 is applied during the first 12 months of the regulations' validity and until the first 15th of January following that period.

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Accompaniment Service
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Tugboat provides accompaniment instead of active pushing/pulling
surcharges_and_multipliers.applied_to: Maximum tariff based on vessel GT

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Dead Ship
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Vessels without propulsion engine or steering capability

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Dry Dock / Slipway Maneuver
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Entry or exit from dry dock or varadero

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Interior Movement
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Complete interior movement service within the port

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Bay Distance Surcharge
surcharges_and_multipliers.geographic_application: Services starting or ending in the 'Bay' (from port mouth to line Punta Blanca - Santa Catalina)
surcharges_and_multipliers.exclusion: Vessels entering exclusively for fuel supply in Zone I are exempt

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Demurrage / Delay Fee
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Maneuver delayed by > 30 minutes due to causes not attributable to the provider

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Second Tugboat Displacement
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Request for a second tugboat that is not permanently based in Ceuta and must travel from another port

reductions.name: Provider Delay Bonus
reductions.condition: Maneuver delayed by > 30 minutes due to causes attributable to the service provider

bay_area.name: The Bay
bay_area.geographic_limits: Defined from the port mouth to the line connecting Punta Blanca and Santa Catalina

prohibited_charges: Any other charge not explicitly listed in these maximum tariffs
administrative_rules.retention_billing: Billing for tugboat retention due to service interruption starts once the service has already begun.
administrative_rules.hourly_billing: Hourly rates and retention rates are billed per hour or fraction thereof.
